demographics.living_situation: lives at home, alone at the time of the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My throat feels like it's glued shut. I tried to eat some dry crackers and now I can't swallow properly, and it burns intensely. I feel like I'm choking.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly tonight while I was eating dry crackers and it won't settle — I'm scared something is stuck or my throat is closing over.

symptom_narrative.onset: suddenly this evening, while eating dry crackers
symptom_narrative.duration: going on for a while tonight and not settling
symptom_narrative.character: burning, raw, like the food scraped and stuck on the way down; a horrible glued-shut, foreign-body feeling
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really intense and frightening — it feels severe and I keep feeling like I might choke
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: high up in the throat, not down in my chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: started the moment I swallowed the dry crackers and has stayed since
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sipping water helps a tiny bit but the feeling comes back
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to swallow solid food, and my mouth being so dry
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: my mouth is extremely dry and I have almost no spit; I keep trying to clear my throat. No swelling of my lips or tongue that I can see, no wheeze, and I can still breathe.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: my mouth and eyes are always dry and food sometimes catches, but it has never been this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't eat solid food right now and I'm very anxious

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a dry-mouth and dry-eye condition (I was told it goes along with my arthritis)
past_medical_history.how_managed: managed conservatively, I just deal with the dryness
occasional joint aches, kept under control

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home on her own tonight, very distressed and repeatedly sipping water

objective_data_offered.value: I can still sip and swallow small amounts of water, I just can't get solid food down
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-assessment over chat; not an observed or supervised swallow test

objective_data_offered.value: my lips and tongue don't look swollen when I check in the mirror
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own look in a mirror; the pharynx and airway cannot be inspected this way
